The original Gusanos documentation can be found [http://sliekas.org/basara/gusdocs/doku.php here].

== Directory structure ==
The directory structure of Gusanos mods is:

* mod.cfg : mod [[Gusanos cfg|configuration]]
* objects/ : directory of objects
  '' ''.obj : all kind of [[Gusanos objects|objects]]
** ninjarope.obj
** death.obj
** wormdig.obj
  '' ''.exp : [[Gusanos explosions|explosions]]
* weapons/
  '' ''.wpn : [[Gusanos weapons|weapons]]
* sounds/
** chat.ogg
  '' ''.wav or *.ogg
* sprites/
  '' ''.png
* fonts/
** minifont
* mapeffects/
  '' ''.mfx: [[Gusanos map effects|map effects]]
* scripts/ : [[Lua]] scripts
** <modname>.lua : init-function
** common.lua : init-function fallback, if <modname>.lua was not found
  '' ''.lua

== Gusanos Scripting ==
=== Configurations ===
* [[Gusanos cfg|cfg files]]

=== Script ===
* [[Gusanos game actions|game actions]]
* [[Gusanos explosions|explosions]]
* [[Gusanos map effects|map effects]]
* [[Gusanos objects|objects]]
* [[Gusanos weapons|weapons]]

=== Lua scripting ===
* [[Lua classes]]

== General ==
* [[Gusanos fonts|Fonts]]
* [[Gusanos sprites|Sprites]]
* [[Gusanos sounds|Sounds]]

== Examples ==
* [[Gusanos Tutorial Creating explosive drums using collision layers|Creating explosive drums using collision layers]]
* Check out the existing mods (there are some very famous already included in OLX). You'll find many more examples [/forum/index.php/topic,12842.0.html here].
* [http://comser.robal.org/forum/index.php/board,15.0.html The Gusanos forums provide more help about modding.]

== Changes of Gusanos in OpenLieroX ==
=== Gusanos Console system ===
The Gusanos console is only used internally for Gusanos; OpenLieroX uses an own console system. And many commands/variables of the Gusanos console system are ignored and don't work in OpenLieroX. That are mostly all the game logic related stuff (maxkills etc.; this is all handled by OLX itself) and also system parameters (gfx settings etc.).

=== Gusanos menu system ===
Is completly ignored in OLX. It is not rendered at all.

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20110721114541/http://www.openlierox.net/wiki/index.php/Gusanos_Modding -->
